scripts.test:browser: pnpm run lingui:build && vitest run --config vitest.browser.config.ts
scripts.lingui:build: pnpm -C ../.. --filter lingui-for-svelte build && pnpm run lingui:extract && pnpm run lingui:compile
scripts.build: pnpm run lingui:build && svelte-kit sync && vite build
scripts.check: pnpm run check:ts && pnpm run check:svelte
scripts.check:svelte: pnpm run lingui:build && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:ts: pnpm run lingui:build && svelte-kit sync && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
